use_cases: Creative portfolio landing pages with interactive cursor-driven web animations
Entertainment and gaming sites seeking distinctive cursor effects
Interactive art installations and digital experiences
Brand showcase pages wanting memorable cursor interactions
Creative agency websites highlighting interactive design capabilities
ai_summary: SpiderCursor is a canvas-based cursor effect that creates spider-web-like animated connections between the cursor position and hundreds of randomly distributed anchor points. The effect features smooth easing movement, circular orbital points around the cursor, and dynamically drawn lines that create an organic, web-spanning visual. Best suited for creative portfolios, entertainment sites, and interactive brand experiences where distinctive cursor interactions enhance engagement.
